input.initialPrompt: I have an MSTest project using Microsoft.Testing.Platform. I need to run the tests and produce a TRX report. I'm on .NET SDK 9.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their MSTest tests and produce a TRX report. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with TRX output.

data.content: Project looks good. Running tests with TRX logger:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run MSTest tests with TRX report

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run MSTest tests with TRX report

data.reasoningText:
The project uses Microsoft.Testing.Platform (via `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). To produce a TRX report with `dotnet test`, I can use the `--logger` option:

```
dotnet test --logger "trx"
```

Let me run this.

arguments.description: Run MSTest tests with TRX report

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-7710cc8d6d064963bae094a05e1be402 && dotnet test --logger \"trx\" 2>&1", "description": "Run MSTest tests with TRX report", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run MSTest tests with TRX report
